checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Does destroy_account remove both account and storage atomically?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Create account with storage. 2. Trigger SELFDESTRUCT (EIP-6780 constraints permitting). 3. Verify account removed from _main_trie. 4. Verify address NOT in _storage_tries. 5. Deploy new contract at same address and verify no storage inheritance.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0015. Boundary: tb-005. Incomplete destruction enables unauthorized storage access.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Does destroy_storage handle double-deletion safely?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Call destroy_storage on address with storage - verify deletion succeeds. 2. Call destroy_storage on address without storage - verify no-op (no KeyError). 3. Call destroy_storage twice on same address - verify second is no-op. 4. Verify no exception propagates from double deletion. 5. Test under SELFDESTRUCT trigger conditions.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0016. Boundary: tb-005. KeyError during destruction would crash node.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Does mark_account_created persist across reverts?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Create account in sub-call via CREATE/CREATE2. 2. Revert the sub-call. 3. Verify address still in created_accounts. 4. Verify SSTORE gas accounting reflects created status. 5. Verify marker only cleared at outermost transaction commit.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0017. Boundary: tb-005. Affects EIP-2200 gas refunds and EIP-6780 SELFDESTRUCT eligibility.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Does get_storage return U256(0) for unset keys?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Call get_storage on address without storage trie - verify U256(0). 2. Call get_storage on address with trie but unset key - verify U256(0). 3. Verify SLOAD opcode returns 0 for never-written slots. 4. Test at storage key boundaries (0x0, max uint256). 5. Test for destroyed accounts.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0018. Boundary: tb-005. Non-zero default would cause widespread contract execution errors.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Does set_storage require account existence?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Attempt SSTORE to destroyed account within same transaction. 2. Verify AssertionError is raised before storage write. 3. Verify no orphaned storage trie is created. 4. Test via contract that SELFDESTRUCTs then tries SSTORE. 5. Verify state trie consistency after rejection.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0019. Boundary: tb-005. Orphaned storage tries would corrupt state.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Are empty storage tries cleaned up?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Write storage value to new address. 2. Zero out the storage value. 3. Verify address NOT in _storage_tries after cleanup. 4. Write to same address again and verify new trie created. 5. Test memory growth from repeated write/zero patterns.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0020. Boundary: tb-005. Missing cleanup causes memory accumulation.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is storage_root blocked during active transaction?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Attempt storage_root computation with active snapshots. 2. Verify AssertionError is raised. 3. Verify assertion checks 'not state._snapshots'. 4. Test that block production code never calls storage_root mid-transaction. 5. Verify consensus code waits for transaction completion.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0021. Boundary: tb-010. Incorrect root during active tx causes consensus failure.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Does state_root incorporate all storage roots?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Verify get_storage_root called for every account in _main_trie. 2. Verify correct root returned for accounts with storage. 3. Verify EMPTY_TRIE_ROOT returned for accounts without storage. 4. Compare computed state_root against reference implementation. 5. Test with large number of accounts with varying storage sizes.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0022. Boundary: tb-010. Missing/incorrect storage roots cause consensus split.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Does account_has_storage check key existence only?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Create account with storage trie containing entries. 2. Verify account_has_storage returns True. 3. Zero out all entries (empty trie). 4. Check if empty trie persists (depends on cleanup). 5. Verify return value matches key existence, not entry count.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0023. Boundary: tb-005. Known limitation - may return false positive for empty tries.

checklist_item.title: Is account liveness check correctly implemented?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Verify is_account_alive returns False for nonexistent address. 2. Verify is_account_alive returns False for EMPTY_ACCOUNT. 3. Verify is_account_alive returns True for any non-empty account. 4. Test EIP-161 empty account cleanup integration. 5. Verify liveness affects correct downstream operations.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0024. Incorrect liveness could prevent cleanup or destroy live accounts.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Does modify_state destroy empty accounts?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Create account with balance, transfer out all balance. 2. Verify account has nonce==0, code==b'', balance==0. 3. Verify destroy_account is called automatically. 4. Verify account removed from _main_trie. 5. Test all code paths through modify_state that could result in empty accounts.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0025. Boundary: tb-003, tb-005. State bloat and ghost accounts if cleanup fails.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is ether conservation maintained in move_ether?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Record sender.balance + recipient.balance before move_ether. 2. Execute move_ether with various amounts. 3. Verify sum of balances unchanged after operation. 4. Test with maximum balance values to check overflow. 5. Verify atomic update of both balances.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0026. Boundary: tb-003, tb-005. Ether creation/destruction is catastrophic protocol violation.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Does move_ether check sufficient balance?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Attempt move_ether with amount > sender.balance. 2. Verify AssertionError is raised. 3. Verify state is unchanged after rejection. 4. Test at balance boundaries (sender.balance == amount). 5. Verify no partial transfer occurs.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0027. Boundary: tb-003. Missing check enables unlimited ether extraction.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Does increment_nonce increase by exactly 1?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Record nonce before increment_nonce. 2. Call increment_nonce and verify nonce == old_nonce + 1. 3. Test at U64.MAX - 1 boundary. 4. Verify wrapping behavior at U64.MAX (should not wrap). 5. Verify nonce is monotonically increasing.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0028. Boundary: tb-003. Nonce wrap-around enables replay of historical transactions.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Does get_storage_original return U256(0) for created accounts?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Create new account within transaction. 2. Call get_storage_original for any key. 3. Verify U256(0) returned regardless of current storage. 4. Verify SSTORE gas accounting reflects zero original value. 5. Test EIP-2200 gas refund calculations.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0029. Boundary: tb-005. Non-zero original for created accounts causes wrong gas refunds.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Does get_storage_original read from outermost snapshot?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Record storage value before transaction. 2. Modify storage in transaction. 3. Call get_storage_original and verify it matches pre-tx value. 4. Verify _snapshots[0] is used, not current state. 5. Test in deeply nested call contexts.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0030. Boundary: tb-005. Wrong snapshot index causes incorrect EIP-2200 gas refunds.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Does transient storage return U256(0) for unset keys?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Call get_transient_storage for address without transient trie. 2. Verify U256(0) returned. 3. Call for address with trie but unset key. 4. Verify U256(0) returned. 5. Test TLOAD opcode returns 0 for never-written slots.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0031. Boundary: tb-005. Non-zero default could break re-entrancy guards using EIP-1153.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is transient storage properly scoped to single transaction?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Set transient storage in transaction A. 2. Commit transaction A. 3. Start new transaction B. 4. Read transient storage and verify all values are U256(0). 5. Verify transient_storage._tries is empty at transaction start.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0032. Boundary: tb-003, tb-005. Cross-tx leakage breaks all TSTORE/TLOAD contracts.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Are empty transient storage tries cleaned up?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. TSTORE a value to new address. 2. TSTORE zero to same slot. 3. Verify address NOT in transient_storage._tries. 4. Test memory growth within single transaction. 5. Verify cleanup bounded by gas limit.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0033. Boundary: tb-005. Memory growth bounded by tx gas limit.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is EIP-7623 gas validation enforced correctly?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Compute intrinsic_gas and calldata_floor for test transaction. 2. Submit tx with gas == max(intrinsic_gas, calldata_floor) - 1. 3. Verify InsufficientTransactionGasError raised. 4. Submit tx with gas == max(intrinsic_gas, calldata_floor). 5. Verify transaction accepted. Check for off-by-one in comparison.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0034. Boundary: tb-001, tb-002. Fusaka-specific EIP-7623 validation.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is EIP-2681 nonce overflow check enforced?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Submit transaction with nonce == U64.MAX_VALUE. 2. Verify NonceOverflowError raised. 3. Submit transaction with nonce == U64.MAX_VALUE - 1. 4. Verify transaction accepted (if other checks pass). 5. Verify U256 comparison used, not U64 (no wrap).
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0035. Boundary: tb-001, tb-002. Overflow to 0 enables historical tx replay.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is MAX_INIT_CODE_SIZE enforced for contract creation?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Submit contract creation tx with len(data) == MAX_INIT_CODE_SIZE + 1. 2. Verify InitCodeTooLargeError raised. 3. Submit with len(data) == MAX_INIT_CODE_SIZE. 4. Verify transaction accepted. 5. Verify check only applies when tx.to == Bytes0.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0036. Boundary: tb-001, tb-002. Oversized initcode causes DoS during deployment.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is EIP-7825 TX_MAX_GAS_LIMIT enforced?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Submit transaction with gas == 16,777,217 (TX_MAX_GAS_LIMIT + 1). 2. Verify TransactionGasLimitExceededError raised. 3. Submit with gas == 16,777,216. 4. Verify transaction accepted. 5. Compare behavior across client implementations for consensus.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0037. Boundary: tb-001, tb-002. Fusaka-specific EIP-7825. Cross-client divergence causes consensus failure.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is EIP-7623 calldata token counting correct?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Create calldata with known zero/non-zero byte distribution. 2. Compute expected tokens: zero_count*1 + non_zero_count*4. 3. Verify implementation matches expected token count. 4. Test edge cases: all zeros, all non-zeros, mixed patterns. 5. Verify both intrinsic_gas and calldata_floor use correct counts.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0038. Boundary: tb-001. Fusaka-specific EIP-7623 token counting.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is EIP-7623 calldata floor formula correct?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Compute expected calldata_floor manually: tokens * 10 + 21000. 2. Compare with implementation's calldata_floor. 3. Verify FLOOR_CALLDATA_COST == 10. 4. Verify TX_BASE_COST == 21000. 5. Test with various calldata sizes and compositions.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0039. Boundary: tb-001. Fusaka-specific EIP-7623 floor formula.
